title: Verify Claude Code and Codex CLI auth work inside a fresh Daytona sandbox

goal.value: Verify Claude Code and Codex CLI auth work inside a fresh Daytona sandbox

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String: mkdir -p .workflow/fabro; node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const clean=(value)=>String(value||'').replace(/sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+/g,'[redacted]').trim().slice(0,800); const usable=(key)=>{const value=process.env[key]||''; const unresolved=value.charCodeAt(0)===123 && value.charCodeAt(1)===123; return Boolean(value && !unresolved);}; const run=(cmd,args,timeout=120000)=>{const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{encoding:'utf8',timeout,env:{...process.env,CI:'1'}}); return {cmd:[cmd,...args].join(' '), status:r.status, signal:r.signal||null, stdout:clean(r.stdout), stderr:clean(r.stderr)};}; const env={CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN:usable('CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN')}; const checks=[run('claude',['--version'],45000), run('claude',['-p','Reply with exactly OK.'],120000)]; const missing=Object.entries(env).filter(([,ok])=>!ok).map(([key])=>key); const failed=checks.filter((check)=>check.status!==0); const report={ok:missing.length===0 && failed.length===0, env, missing, checks, failed}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report,null,2)); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),path=require('path'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json','utf8')); const codexAuthFile=fs.existsSync(path.join(os.homedir(),'.codex','auth.json')); const lines=['# Daytona CLI Auth Runtime Smoke','', 'ok=' + report.ok, 'fabro_codex_backend_stage=succeeded', 'codex_auth_file=' + codexAuthFile, '', '## Env', ...Object.entries(report.env).map(([key,value])=>'- ' + key + '=' + value), '', '## Checks', ...report.checks.map((check)=>'- ' + check.cmd + ' status=' + check.status + (check.signal ? ' signal=' + check.signal : '') + (check.stdout ? ' output=' + check.stdout.split('
')[0] : '') + (check.stderr ? ' stderr=' + check.stderr.split('
')[0] : ''))]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.md', lines.join('
')+'
'); console.log(lines.join('
')); if(!report.ok || !codexAuthFile) process.exit(1);"

goal.String: Verify Claude Code and Codex CLI auth work inside a fresh Daytona sandbox

model_stylesheet.String:
*      { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .codex { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }

spec.graph_source:
digraph DaytonaCliAuthRuntimeSmoke {
    graph [
        goal="Verify Claude Code and Codex CLI auth work inside a fresh Daytona sandbox",
        persona="cli-auth-smoke",
        inputs="none",
        outputs="cli_auth_runtime_report",
        model_stylesheet="
            *      { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .codex { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }
        "
    ]

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    check_claude_runtime [
        label="Check Claude Runtime",
        type="command",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/fabro; node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const clean=(value)=>String(value||'').replace(/sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+/g,'[redacted]').trim().slice(0,800); const usable=(key)=>{const value=process.env[key]||''; const unresolved=value.charCodeAt(0)===123 && value.charCodeAt(1)===123; return Boolean(value && !unresolved);}; const run=(cmd,args,timeout=120000)=>{const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{encoding:'utf8',timeout,env:{...process.env,CI:'1'}}); return {cmd:[cmd,...args].join(' '), status:r.status, signal:r.signal||null, stdout:clean(r.stdout), stderr:clean(r.stderr)};}; const env={CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN:usable('CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN')}; const checks=[run('claude',['--version'],45000), run('claude',['-p','Reply with exactly OK.'],120000)]; const missing=Object.entries(env).filter(([,ok])=>!ok).map(([key])=>key); const failed=checks.filter((check)=>check.status!==0); const report={ok:missing.length===0 && failed.length===0, env, missing, checks, failed}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report,null,2)); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    check_codex_runtime [
        label="Check Codex Runtime",
        class="codex",
        prompt="Reply with exactly OK."
    ]

    write_report [
        label="Write Report",
        type="command",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),path=require('path'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json','utf8')); const codexAuthFile=fs.existsSync(path.join(os.homedir(),'.codex','auth.json')); const lines=['# Daytona CLI Auth Runtime Smoke','', 'ok=' + report.ok, 'fabro_codex_backend_stage=succeeded', 'codex_auth_file=' + codexAuthFile, '', '## Env', ...Object.entries(report.env).map(([key,value])=>'- ' + key + '=' + value), '', '## Checks', ...report.checks.map((check)=>'- ' + check.cmd + ' status=' + check.status + (check.signal ? ' signal=' + check.signal : '') + (check.stdout ? ' output=' + check.stdout.split('\\n')[0] : '') + (check.stderr ? ' stderr=' + check.stderr.split('\\n')[0] : ''))]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.md', lines.join('\\n')+'\\n'); console.log(lines.join('\\n')); if(!report.ok || !codexAuthFile) process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    fail_runtime [
        label="Fail Runtime",
        type="command",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const body=fs.existsSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json') ? fs.readFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-cli-auth-runtime-smoke.json','utf8') : '{}'; console.error(body); process.exit(1);\""
    ]

    start -> check_claude_runtime
    check_claude_runtime -> check_codex_runtime [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    check_claude_runtime -> fail_runtime [label="Fail"]
    check_codex_runtime -> write_report [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    check_codex_runtime -> fail_runtime [label="Fail"]
    write_report -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    write_report -> fail_runtime [label="Fail"]
}
